message:
fix: five code-review bugs — nil deref, orphan processes, path safety, error loss, throttle

- refinery/engineer: add nil check for merge slot status to prevent panic
- mayor/manager: use KillSessionWithProcesses to prevent orphan processes
- polecat/manager: check filepath.Abs errors to prevent safety bypass on nuke
- witness/handlers: preserve earlier non-fatal errors instead of overwriting
- cmd/sling_batch: reset activeCount after cooldown so max-concurrent works

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
